title: Supervise Maintenance Activities of Personnel Without Required Access Authorization
description: supervise the maintenance activities of maintenance personnel without required access authorization

checks.name: Maintenance Personnel Without Required Access Authorization are Supervised During Maintenance
checks.purpose: Supervision of unauthorized maintenance personnel including escort requirements, access restrictions, and activity monitoring is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Client

checks.name: Maintenance Personnel Without Required Access Authorization are Supervised During Maintenance
checks.purpose: Supervision of unauthorized maintenance personnel is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Windows Server

checks.name: Maintenance Personnel Without Required Access Authorization are Supervised During Maintenance
checks.purpose: Supervision of unauthorized maintenance personnel is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Linux

checks.name: Maintenance Personnel Without Required Access Authorization are Supervised During Maintenance
checks.purpose: Supervision of unauthorized maintenance personnel is an organizational GRC documentation concern and is not technically verifiable via automated check on Debian

remediation: Establish and document escort and supervision requirements for maintenance personnel who do not hold required access authorizations. Ensure authorized organizational personnel accompany and monitor all activities of uncleared maintenance staff during CUI system maintenance. Maintain records of supervised maintenance activities.
